\section*{SU(N)$\times$SU(N) non-Veneziano theories: marginal operators}

Matter (with anomaly-required $\square$/$\bar{\square}$ from $\delta$), bifundamental edges $Q^{r}_{ij}$ ($r\in\{++,+-,--\}$, $i\to j$), AF bound $N_f \Box \alpha N+\gamma$ at the $\mathcal{O}$ point per node, and always-marginal operators at the IR fixed point ($|R-2|<10^{-6}$, $N\in\{10,20,30\}$). Comparison $\Box$ is $\le$ if a marginal exists at $b_0=0$ saturation (max-$N_f$), $<$ otherwise. The matter-richer node is placed second.
